title: Missing warning for different bit lengths

features.name: concatenation with replication using single-bit select
features.description: Code should include a concatenation with replication like { {N{bit_sel}}, signal } where N is the replication count and bit_sel is a single bit selection
features.snippet:
input signed [3:0] pm_offset;
wire [16:0] freq = { {12{pm_offset[3]}}, pm_offset };

features.name: concatenation with unsized decimal literal
features.description: Code should include concatenation with unsized decimal literals like 7'd0 that relies on implicit width calculation

features.name: concatenation width mismatch near replication boundary
features.description: Code should include a concatenation where the replication count is one less than required (e.g., 12 instead of 13) causing silent width truncation
features.snippet:
input signed [3:0] pm_offset;
wire [16:0] freq = { {12{pm_offset[3]}}, pm_offset };
